name: MindKatt:First Strike
short_description: An action-adventure game set in a dystopian future where mentally evolved cats fight for their freedom using robotic suits to interact with the human world.
detailed_description:
MindKatt is an action-adventure game set in a dystopian future where the protagonists are mentally evolved cats that wear robotic suits to interact with the human world.

In this shared world, humans dominate the MindKatt, an advanced species of cats that have been enslaved and used as tools in the fight for power. However, these felines possess unique abilities, defying their fate and fighting for their freedom.

The game features dynamic gameplay, intense combat, charismatic characters, and an intriguing narrative that unfolds through gameplay. The detailed 3D art, created with the power of Unreal Engine 5, and the highly stylized world will immerse you in a visually stunning and emotionally captivating experience.

This first episode serves as an introduction to a larger universe, where the narrative will expand and deepen in future games, offering an even richer and more complex experience.

The adventure begins here, but what follows will go beyond what you can imagine. Prepare for a journey that will challenge your expectations and lead you to a final conclusion that will define the fate of the MindKatt and humanity.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
